title: collomia debilis subsp. typica
intro: Collomia debilis subsp. typica, also known as slender collomia, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the phlox family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Collomia debilis subsp. typica include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in tinctures and salves, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
